case_title: JANALE KING VS. AMERICAN GREETINGS CORPORATION AN OHIO CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100022358) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING, JANALE

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING, JANALE AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN GREETINGS CORPORATION AN OHIO CORPORATION SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-25-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-28-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-02-2016
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 16196018)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-25-2016 CONTINUED TO JUL-06-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-16-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-06-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-16-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
